query:
SELECT method, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(amount) as total_amount
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'ff365'
GROUP BY method
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT method, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(amount) as total_amount
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'ff365'
GROUP BY method
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
